reason: The Edge pits two men against ruthless Alaskan wilderness and a hungry bear in a desperate survival duel.
Apollo 13 is a nail-biting true-story of astronauts battling life-threatening odds in the void of space.
White Squall’s real-life storm leaves stranded sailors fighting the sea for survival.
Fly Away Home follows a girl’s wilderness odyssey leading orphaned geese to safety through vast wilds.
Last of the Mohicans shows frontier survival against nature’s unforgiving elements and hostile pursuit.
The Lost World: Jurassic Park traps explorers on a dinosaur-infested island, desperate to escape.
Dances With Wolves captures a lone outsider's survival amid harsh, uncharted Indigenous territory.
Everest documents climbers’ perilous fight against altitude, cold, and nature’s indomitable forces.
The Abyss submerges deep-sea divers in a life-or-death struggle against crushing ocean depths.
Heat includes a tense Albuquerque heist-turned-survival test in a desert environment.
